headline: Why Danaher (DHR) Shares Are Falling Today
summary: Shares of diversified science and technology company Danaher (NYSE:DHR) fell 13.3% in the morning session after it reported underwhelming second-quarter results. The negative reaction appeared to stem from underlying concerns about the company's profitability. headline: Why Repligen (RGEN) Stock Is Trading Lower Today
summary: Shares of biopharma manufacturing company Repligen Corporation (NASDAQ:RGEN) fell 7% in the morning session after investors reacted to the company's weak full-year guidance ahead of its upcoming earnings report, alongside concerns over project delays highlighted by industry peer Danaher. The cautious outlook amplified bearish sentiment before Repligen's second-quarter results, expected on July 28. The guidance signaled expectations for slower growth and tougher near-term conditions.
